classifications.requirement: 1 | Rules Checking & Notification content: Checking will be performed in following sequence: 1. If user is NGA user and onboard with new device, display Change Device Notice 2. If user is NGA user and onboard with old device, bypass Change Device & Change App Notice 3. If user is RMBP & have not onboarded to NGA before, display Change App Notice | IAM: - User is existing M2U App user, option to proceed or cancel. - Check registered device
